summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TP LoveCo handicraft e-commerce website. Backend APIs mostly functional with some security issues. Frontend UI working excellently with all features operational.

critical_bugs.issue: Authorization not enforced - unauthorized requests succeed when they should return 401
critical_bugs.impact: Security vulnerability - anyone can create/modify products without admin authentication

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for successful product creation
minor_issues.impact: Not following REST conventions but functionally works

configuration_issues.impact: May affect cookie-based authentication in some scenarios

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 401 errors for /api/auth/me calls on public pages

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories bento grid, and featured products
All 7 categories displayed correctly (Hamper, Bouquet, Keychain, Hair Accessories, Plushie, Custom Album, Custom Embroidery)
Products page shows grid layout with proper filtering and search
Category filtering works - clicking category shows filtered products
Product detail page navigation with WhatsApp order button (6388533973)
About and Contact pages load with correct WhatsApp/Instagram links
Admin login works with credentials admin@tploveco.com / admin123
Admin dashboard shows correct stats and product management
Categories API returns all 7 expected categories
Products API with filtering and search works
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical backend authorization issue - unauthorized product creation/modification should return 401. The require_admin middleware is not being properly enforced on product CRUD endpoints.
